title: Let's Build Something Amazing Together
description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear from you and discuss how we can bring your ideas to life with modern web technologies.
copyright: Crafted with ❤️ and modern web technologies.
builtWith: Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: This portfolio does not collect personal data.
points: No analytics, ads, or tracking scripts.
No contact form — if you email me, it happens via your email provider.
Your theme and language preference may be stored locally in your browser (localStorage).
External links (e.g., GitHub/LinkedIn) are governed by their own privacy policies.
